title: "Modelling"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-10"
---

```{r}
# Libraries
library(rminer)
```

```{r}
# Get Data
baltimore_uni <- readRDS("data_clean/baltimore_uni.rds")
baltimore_multi <- readRDS("data_clean/baltimore_multi.rds")

lancaster_uni <- readRDS("data_clean/lancaster_uni.rds")
lancaster_multi <- readRDS("data_clean/lancaster_multi.rds")

philadelphia_uni <- readRDS("data_clean/philadelphia_uni.rds")
philadelphia_multi <- readRDS("data_clean/philadelphia_multi.rds")

richmond_uni <- readRDS("data_clean/richmond_uni.rds")
richmond_multi <- readRDS("data_clean/richmond_multi.rds")
```


```{r}

NPRED <- 7
# LAGS removido — substituído pelos UNI_CONFIGS
RUNS  <- 20
STEP  <- 7
K     <- 7
W_NMAE <- 0.5
W_RMSE <- 0.5

UNI_CONFIGS <- list(
  UNI_A = c(1, 7),
  UNI_B = c(1, 2, 7),
  UNI_C = c(1, 2, 7, 14),
  UNI_D = c(1, 2, 7, 14, 28)
)

MULTI_CONFIGS <- list(
  MULTI_A = c("Sales_Lag1", "TouristEvent_num", "IsHoliday"),
  MULTI_B = c("Sales_Lag1", "Sales_Lag7", "TouristEvent_num", "IsHoliday"),
  MULTI_C = c("Sales_Lag1", "Sales_Lag3", "Sales_Lag7",
              "TouristEvent_num", "IsHoliday", "IsBlackFriday", "IsChristmas"),
  MULTI_D = c("Sales_Lag1", "Sales_Lag3", "Sales_Lag7", "Sales_Lag28",
              "rolling_mean_7", "TouristEvent_num", "IsHoliday",
              "IsBlackFriday", "IsChristmas")
)

VINP      <- vector("list", length=2)
VINP[[1]] <- list(c(1,2,7), c(1,7))
VINP[[2]] <- list(c(1,7),   c(1,2,7))

prepare_exogenous_config <- function(df_multi, n_rows, exo_cols) {
  cols_disponiveis <- intersect(exo_cols, colnames(df_multi))
  if (length(cols_disponiveis) == 0) return(NULL)
  as.matrix(df_multi[1:n_rows, cols_disponiveis, drop=FALSE])
}

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# FUNÇÃO DE PÓS-PROCESSAMENTO
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
postprocess_predictions <- function(predictions, dates_futuros=NULL) {

  # 1. Arredondar para inteiro — não pode haver clientes decimais
  predictions <- round(predictions)

  # 2. Garantir não negativos
  predictions <- pmax(predictions, 0L)

  # 3. Aplicar regras de dias fechados se datas fornecidas
  if (!is.null(dates_futuros)) {
    datas_str <- format(as.Date(dates_futuros), "%m-%d")

    # Dias onde a loja está sempre fechada (0 clientes)
    dias_fechados <- c(
      "12-25",  # Natal
      "12-31",  # Véspera de Ano Novo
      "01-01"   # Ano Novo
    )

    fechado_idx <- datas_str %in% dias_fechados
    if (any(fechado_idx)) {
      cat("  [Pós-processamento] Dias forçados a 0:",
          format(as.Date(dates_futuros)[fechado_idx], "%Y-%m-%d"), "\n")
      predictions[fechado_idx] <- 0L
    }
  }

  return(as.integer(predictions))
}

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# FUNÇÃO DE SCORING PONDERADO (NMAE + RMSE)
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
weighted_score <- function(med_nmae, med_rmse,
                           all_nmae, all_rmse,
                           w_nmae=W_NMAE, w_rmse=W_RMSE) {
  # Normaliza as medianas pelo range de todos os modelos
  # Score mais baixo = modelo melhor
  range_nmae <- diff(range(all_nmae))
  range_rmse <- diff(range(all_rmse))

  norm_nmae <- if (range_nmae > 0) (med_nmae - min(all_nmae)) / range_nmae else 0
  norm_rmse <- if (range_rmse > 0) (med_rmse - min(all_rmse)) / range_rmse else 0

  return(w_nmae * norm_nmae + w_rmse * norm_rmse)
}
```


```{r}
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# FASE I — UNIVARIADO
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
forecast_univariate_phaseI_configs <- function(serie, loja_nome,
                                                configs=UNI_CONFIGS,
                                                npred=NPRED) {
  S      <- serie
  srange <- as.numeric(diff(quantile(S, probs=c(0.01,0.99))))
  resultados_config <- list()

  for (cfg_nome in names(configs)) {
    lags <- configs[[cfg_nome]]
    cat("\n--", loja_nome, cfg_nome, "lags:", paste(lags, collapse=","), "--\n")

    D  <- CasesSeries(S, lags)
    N  <- nrow(D)
    TR <- 1:(N - npred)
    TS <- (N - npred + 1):N

    NN  <- fit(y~., D[TR,], model="mlpe",        search="heuristic")
    RF  <- fit(y~., D[TR,], model="randomForest", search="heuristic")

    START <- N - npred + 1
    PNN   <- postprocess_predictions(lforecast(NN, D, start=START, horizon=npred))
    PRF   <- postprocess_predictions(lforecast(RF, D, start=START, horizon=npred))
    PSN   <- as.integer(round(S[(length(S)-npred*2+1):(length(S)-npred)]))
    Y     <- D[TS,]$y

    nmae_nn <- mmetric(Y, PNN, metric="NMAE", val=srange)
    nmae_rf <- mmetric(Y, PRF, metric="NMAE", val=srange)
    nmae_sn <- mmetric(Y, PSN, metric="NMAE", val=srange)
    rmse_nn <- mmetric(Y, PNN, metric="RMSE")
    rmse_rf <- mmetric(Y, PRF, metric="RMSE")
    rmse_sn <- mmetric(Y, PSN, metric="RMSE")

    cat("NN | NMAE:", round(nmae_nn,2), "% | RMSE:", round(rmse_nn,2), "\n")
    cat("RF | NMAE:", round(nmae_rf,2), "% | RMSE:", round(rmse_rf,2), "\n")
    cat("SN | NMAE:", round(nmae_sn,2), "% | RMSE:", round(rmse_sn,2), "\n")

    resultados_config[[cfg_nome]] <- list(
      Y=Y, PNN=PNN, PRF=PRF, PSN=PSN,
      nmae_nn=nmae_nn, rmse_nn=rmse_nn,
      nmae_rf=nmae_rf, rmse_rf=rmse_rf,
      nmae_sn=nmae_sn, rmse_sn=rmse_sn
    )
  }
  return(resultados_config)
}

res_uni_balt <- forecast_univariate_phaseI_configs(baltimore_uni$Num_Customers, "Baltimore")
res_uni_lanc <- forecast_univariate_phaseI_configs(lancaster_uni$Num_Customers, "Lancaster")
res_uni_phil <- forecast_univariate_phaseI_configs(philadelphia_uni$Num_Customers, "Philadelphia")
res_uni_rich <- forecast_univariate_phaseI_configs(richmond_uni$Num_Customers, "Richmond")

```


```{r}

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# FASE II — UNIVARIADO — Growing Window com RUNS fixo
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
backtesting_univariate_configs <- function(serie, loja_nome,
                                            configs=UNI_CONFIGS,
                                            npred=NPRED, runs=RUNS, step=STEP) {
  S      <- serie
  srange <- as.numeric(diff(quantile(S, probs=c(0.01,0.99))))
  resultados_config <- list()

  for (cfg_nome in names(configs)) {
    lags <- configs[[cfg_nome]]
    cat("\n===", loja_nome, cfg_nome, "lags:", paste(lags, collapse=","), "===\n")

    D <- CasesSeries(S, lags)
    L <- nrow(D)
    W <- L - npred - (runs - 1) * step
    if (W < 30) { cat("  [SKIP] Janela demasiado pequena\n"); next }

    cat("W:", W, "dias | runs:", runs, "\n")

    ev_nn_nmae <- numeric(runs); ev_nn_rmse <- numeric(runs)
    ev_rf_nmae <- numeric(runs); ev_rf_rmse <- numeric(runs)
    ev_sn_nmae <- numeric(runs); ev_sn_rmse <- numeric(runs)
    all_Y <- c(); all_PNN <- c(); all_PRF <- c()

    for (b in 1:runs) {
      H2   <- holdout(D$y, ratio=npred, mode="incremental",
                      iter=b, window=W, increment=step)
      M_nn <- fit(y~., D[H2$tr,], model="mlpe",        search="heuristic")
      M_rf <- fit(y~., D[H2$tr,], model="randomForest", search="heuristic")

      P_nn <- postprocess_predictions(lforecast(M_nn, D, start=(length(H2$tr)+1), horizon=npred))
      P_rf <- postprocess_predictions(lforecast(M_rf, D, start=(length(H2$tr)+1), horizon=npred))

      inicio_S <- H2$ts[1] + max(lags)
      P_sn     <- as.integer(round(S[(inicio_S - npred):(inicio_S - 1)]))
      Y_real   <- D[H2$ts,]$y

      ev_nn_nmae[b] <- mmetric(Y_real, P_nn, metric="NMAE", val=srange)
      ev_nn_rmse[b] <- mmetric(Y_real, P_nn, metric="RMSE")
      ev_rf_nmae[b] <- mmetric(Y_real, P_rf, metric="NMAE", val=srange)
      ev_rf_rmse[b] <- mmetric(Y_real, P_rf, metric="RMSE")
      ev_sn_nmae[b] <- mmetric(Y_real, P_sn, metric="NMAE", val=srange)
      ev_sn_rmse[b] <- mmetric(Y_real, P_sn, metric="RMSE")

      cat("Iter:", b,
          "| NN:", round(ev_nn_nmae[b],1), "/", round(ev_nn_rmse[b],1),
          "| RF:", round(ev_rf_nmae[b],1), "/", round(ev_rf_rmse[b],1),
          "| SN:", round(ev_sn_nmae[b],1), "/", round(ev_sn_rmse[b],1), "\n")

      all_Y   <- c(all_Y,   Y_real)
      all_PNN <- c(all_PNN, P_nn)
      all_PRF <- c(all_PRF, P_rf)
    }

    med_nn_nmae <- median(ev_nn_nmae); med_nn_rmse <- median(ev_nn_rmse)
    med_rf_nmae <- median(ev_rf_nmae); med_rf_rmse <- median(ev_rf_rmse)
    med_sn_nmae <- median(ev_sn_nmae); med_sn_rmse <- median(ev_sn_rmse)

    all_nmae <- c(med_nn_nmae, med_rf_nmae, med_sn_nmae)
    all_rmse <- c(med_nn_rmse, med_rf_rmse, med_sn_rmse)
    scores   <- c(
      NN = weighted_score(med_nn_nmae, med_nn_rmse, all_nmae, all_rmse),
      RF = weighted_score(med_rf_nmae, med_rf_rmse, all_nmae, all_rmse),
      SN = weighted_score(med_sn_nmae, med_sn_rmse, all_nmae, all_rmse)
    )
    melhor <- names(which.min(scores))

    cat("Medianas | NN:", round(med_nn_nmae,2), "%", round(med_nn_rmse,2),
        "| RF:", round(med_rf_nmae,2), "%", round(med_rf_rmse,2),
        "| SN:", round(med_sn_nmae,2), "%", round(med_sn_rmse,2), "\n")
    cat("Score ponderado:", paste(names(scores), round(scores,3), sep="=", collapse=" | "), "\n")
    cat("Melhor:", melhor, "\n")

    # Gráfico agregado por config
    plot(all_Y, type="l", col="black",
         main=paste0(loja_nome, " ", cfg_nome, " — Growing Window"),
         ylab="Num_Customers", xlab="Observações de teste acumuladas")
    lines(all_PNN, col="blue", lty=2)
    lines(all_PRF, col="red",  lty=3)
    legend("topright", c("Real","NN","RF"),
           col=c("black","blue","red"), lty=c(1,2,3))

    resultados_config[[cfg_nome]] <- list(
      ev_nn_nmae=ev_nn_nmae, ev_nn_rmse=ev_nn_rmse,
      ev_rf_nmae=ev_rf_nmae, ev_rf_rmse=ev_rf_rmse,
      ev_sn_nmae=ev_sn_nmae, ev_sn_rmse=ev_sn_rmse,
      med_nn_nmae=med_nn_nmae, med_nn_rmse=med_nn_rmse,
      med_rf_nmae=med_rf_nmae, med_rf_rmse=med_rf_rmse,
      med_sn_nmae=med_sn_nmae, med_sn_rmse=med_sn_rmse,
      scores=scores, melhor=melhor
    )
  }
  return(resultados_config)
}

```

```{r}
bt_uni_balt <- backtesting_univariate_configs(baltimore_uni$Num_Customers,    "Baltimore")
bt_uni_lanc <- backtesting_univariate_configs(lancaster_uni$Num_Customers,    "Lancaster")
bt_uni_phil <- backtesting_univariate_configs(philadelphia_uni$Num_Customers, "Philadelphia")
bt_uni_rich <- backtesting_univariate_configs(richmond_uni$Num_Customers,     "Richmond")
```

```{r}
# ── Tabela resumo univariado ────────────────────────────────────────────────
build_tabela_uni <- function(bt_list, loja_nome) {
  rows <- lapply(names(bt_list), function(cfg) {
    r <- bt_list[[cfg]]
    data.frame(
      Loja   = loja_nome,
      Config = cfg,
      NN_NMAE = round(r$med_nn_nmae, 2),
      NN_RMSE = round(r$med_nn_rmse, 2),
      RF_NMAE = round(r$med_rf_nmae, 2),
      RF_RMSE = round(r$med_rf_rmse, 2),
      SN_NMAE = round(r$med_sn_nmae, 2),
      SN_RMSE = round(r$med_sn_rmse, 2),
      Melhor  = r$melhor,
      Melhoria_pct = round(
        (r$med_sn_nmae - min(r$med_nn_nmae, r$med_rf_nmae)) / r$med_sn_nmae * 100, 1)
    )
  })
  do.call(rbind, rows)
}

tabela_uni <- rbind(
  build_tabela_uni(bt_uni_balt, "Baltimore"),
  build_tabela_uni(bt_uni_lanc, "Lancaster"),
  build_tabela_uni(bt_uni_phil, "Philadelphia"),
  build_tabela_uni(bt_uni_rich, "Richmond")
)
print(tabela_uni)
```


```{r}
# ── Gráfico NMAE + RMSE por iteração ───────────────────────────────────────
plot_metricas <- function(bt_result, loja_nome) {
  for (cfg_nome in names(bt_result)) {
    r     <- bt_result[[cfg_nome]]
    runs  <- length(r$ev_nn_nmae)
    iters <- 1:runs

    par(mfrow=c(1,2))

    # NMAE
    ylim_nmae <- range(c(r$ev_nn_nmae, r$ev_rf_nmae, r$ev_sn_nmae))
    plot(iters, r$ev_nn_nmae, type="b", col="blue", pch=19, lty=1,
         ylim=ylim_nmae,
         main=paste0(loja_nome, " ", cfg_nome, " — NMAE por iteração"),
         xlab="Iteração", ylab="NMAE (%)")
    lines(iters, r$ev_rf_nmae, type="b", col="red",   pch=17, lty=2)
    lines(iters, r$ev_sn_nmae, type="b", col="black", pch=15, lty=3)
    abline(h=median(r$ev_nn_nmae), col="blue",  lty=2, lwd=1.5)
    abline(h=median(r$ev_rf_nmae), col="red",   lty=2, lwd=1.5)
    abline(h=median(r$ev_sn_nmae), col="black", lty=2, lwd=1.5)
    legend("topright",
           c(paste0("NN (med=", round(median(r$ev_nn_nmae),1), "%)"),
             paste0("RF (med=", round(median(r$ev_rf_nmae),1), "%)"),
             paste0("SN (med=", round(median(r$ev_sn_nmae),1), "%)")),
           col=c("blue","red","black"), lty=c(1,2,3), pch=c(19,17,15))

    # RMSE
    ylim_rmse <- range(c(r$ev_nn_rmse, r$ev_rf_rmse, r$ev_sn_rmse))
    plot(iters, r$ev_nn_rmse, type="b", col="blue", pch=19, lty=1,
         ylim=ylim_rmse,
         main=paste0(loja_nome, " ", cfg_nome, " — RMSE por iteração"),
         xlab="Iteração", ylab="RMSE")
    lines(iters, r$ev_rf_rmse, type="b", col="red",   pch=17, lty=2)
    lines(iters, r$ev_sn_rmse, type="b", col="black", pch=15, lty=3)
    abline(h=median(r$ev_nn_rmse), col="blue",  lty=2, lwd=1.5)
    abline(h=median(r$ev_rf_rmse), col="red",   lty=2, lwd=1.5)
    abline(h=median(r$ev_sn_rmse), col="black", lty=2, lwd=1.5)
    legend("topright",
           c(paste0("NN (med=", round(median(r$ev_nn_rmse),1), ")"),
             paste0("RF (med=", round(median(r$ev_rf_rmse),1), ")"),
             paste0("SN (med=", round(median(r$ev_sn_rmse),1), ")")),
           col=c("blue","red","black"), lty=c(1,2,3), pch=c(19,17,15))

    par(mfrow=c(1,1))
  }
}

plot_metricas(bt_uni_balt, "Baltimore")
plot_metricas(bt_uni_lanc, "Lancaster")
plot_metricas(bt_uni_phil, "Philadelphia")
plot_metricas(bt_uni_rich, "Richmond")
```


```{r}
# ── Previsão final univariada (com pós-processamento) ──────────────────────
previsao_final <- function(serie, loja_nome, lags, npred=NPRED,
                           datas_futuras=NULL, melhor_modelo="NN") {
  S <- serie
  D <- CasesSeries(S, lags)
  modelo_final <- fit(y~., D, model=ifelse(melhor_modelo=="RF","randomForest","mlpe"),
                      search="heuristic")
  START   <- nrow(D) + 1
  P_raw   <- lforecast(modelo_final, D, start=START, horizon=npred)
  P_final <- postprocess_predictions(P_raw, datas_futuras)

  cat("\n===", loja_nome, "— Previsão próximos 7 dias ===\n")
  for (i in 1:npred) {
    data_str <- if (!is.null(datas_futuras)) paste0(" (", format(as.Date(datas_futuras)[i], "%Y-%m-%d"), ")") else ""
    cat("Dia +", i, data_str, ":", P_final[i], "clientes\n")
  }

  ultimos <- tail(S, 28)
  plot(1:28, ultimos, type="l", col="black",
       xlim=c(1, 28+npred),
       main=paste0(loja_nome, " — Últimas 4 semanas + Previsão"),
       ylab="Num_Customers", xlab="Dias")
  lines((28+1):(28+npred), P_final, type="b", col="blue", pch=19)
  legend("topleft", c("Real","Previsão"), col=c("black","blue"), lty=1)

  return(P_final)
}

# ── Identificar a melhor config e modelo por loja ──────────────────────────
get_melhor_uni <- function(bt_uni) {
  # Para cada config, pega no score do melhor modelo (NN ou RF)
  scores_por_config <- sapply(names(bt_uni), function(cfg) {
    min(bt_uni[[cfg]]$scores[c("NN","RF")])
  })
  melhor_cfg   <- names(which.min(scores_por_config))
  melhor_modelo <- names(which.min(bt_uni[[melhor_cfg]]$scores[c("NN","RF")]))
  melhor_lags  <- UNI_CONFIGS[[melhor_cfg]]
  cat("Melhor config:", melhor_cfg, "| Melhor modelo:", melhor_modelo,
      "| Lags:", paste(melhor_lags, collapse=","), "\n")
  return(list(cfg=melhor_cfg, modelo=melhor_modelo, lags=melhor_lags))
}

datas_futuras <- seq(as.Date("2014-06-15"), by="day", length.out=7)

melhor_balt <- get_melhor_uni(bt_uni_balt)
melhor_lanc <- get_melhor_uni(bt_uni_lanc)
melhor_phil <- get_melhor_uni(bt_uni_phil)
melhor_rich <- get_melhor_uni(bt_uni_rich)

prev_balt <- previsao_final(baltimore_uni$Num_Customers, "Baltimore",
                             lags=melhor_balt$lags,
                             datas_futuras=datas_futuras,
                             melhor_modelo=melhor_balt$modelo)
prev_lanc <- previsao_final(lancaster_uni$Num_Customers, "Lancaster",
                             lags=melhor_lanc$lags,
                             datas_futuras=datas_futuras,
                             melhor_modelo=melhor_lanc$modelo)
prev_phil <- previsao_final(philadelphia_uni$Num_Customers, "Philadelphia",
                             lags=melhor_phil$lags,
                             datas_futuras=datas_futuras,
                             melhor_modelo=melhor_phil$modelo)
prev_rich <- previsao_final(richmond_uni$Num_Customers, "Richmond",
                             lags=melhor_rich$lags,
                             datas_futuras=datas_futuras,
                             melhor_modelo=melhor_rich$modelo)
```

```{r}
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# FORECAST MULTIVARIADO
# Variáveis endógenas: Num_Customers + Sales_Lag1
# Método MLPE
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

library(vars)
library(forecast)
library(rminer)

# ── Funções do multi-utils.R embutidas ──────────────────────────────────────

vreverse <- function(x) x[length(x):1]

mfit <- function(mtr, model, VINP, exogen=NULL) {
  nmodels <- ncol(mtr)
  lagmax  <- 1
  for (i in 1:nmodels)
    for (j in 1:nmodels)
      lagmax <- max(lagmax, VINP[[i]][[j]])
  mdata <- vector("list", length=nmodels)
  for (i in 1:nmodels) mdata[[i]] <- CasesSeries(mtr[,i], 1:lagmax)
  if (!is.null(exogen)) {
    NR <- nrow(mtr)
    if (is.vector(exogen)) {
      if (NR == length(exogen)) exogen <- cbind(exogen[(lagmax+1):NR])
      else exogen <- cbind(exogen)
    } else if (NR == nrow(exogen)) exogen <- exogen[(lagmax+1):NR,]
    exogen <- as.data.frame(exogen)
  }
  mdata2 <- vector("list", length=nmodels)
  for (i in 1:nmodels) {
    for (j in 1:nmodels) {
      if (j == 1) {
        mnames <- names(mdata[[j]])
        inames <- paste("lag", VINP[[i]][[j]], sep="")
        I <- NULL
        for (k in inames) I <- c(I, which(mnames==k))
        I  <- sort(I)
        D  <- mdata[[j]][,I]
        if (is.vector(D)) D <- data.frame(cbind(D))
        NCD    <- ncol(D)
        dnames <- vreverse(inames)
        ini <- 1; end <- ini + length(dnames) - 1
        names(D)[ini:end] <- paste("x", j, dnames, sep="")
      } else {
        NCD    <- ncol(D)
        inames <- paste("lag", VINP[[i]][[j]], sep="")
        dnames <- vreverse(inames)
        D      <- cbind(D, mdata[[j]][,dnames])
        ini    <- NCD + 1; end <- ini + length(dnames) - 1
        names(D)[ini:end] <- paste("x", j, dnames, sep="")
      }
    }
    if (!is.null(exogen)) D <- cbind(D, exogen, y=mdata[[i]]$y)
    else D <- cbind(D, y=mdata[[i]]$y)
    mdata2[[i]] <- D
  }
  mmodels <- vector("list", length=nmodels)
  for (i in 1:nmodels) mmodels[[i]] <- fit(y~., mdata2[[i]], model=model)
  return(list(mdata=mdata2, mmodels=mmodels, vinp=VINP))
}

lforecastm <- function(model, h=10, exogen=NULL) {
  models <- length(model$mmodels)
  res    <- vector("list", length=models)
  for (j in 1:models) res[[j]] <- vector(length=h)
  if (!is.null(exogen) && is.vector(exogen)) exogen <- cbind(exogen)
  exogen <- as.data.frame(exogen)
  if (!is.null(exogen)) nexo <- names(exogen)
  VEX    <- vector("list", length=models)
  vnames <- vector("list", length=models)
  VI     <- vector("list", length=models)
  for (i in 1:h) {
    for (j in 1:models) {
      start    <- nrow(model$mdata[[j]]) - h + 1
      VEX[[j]] <- model$mdata[[j]][start+i-1,]
      if (i > 1) {
        for (k in 1:models) {
          VI[[k]]     <- intersect(1:(i-1), model$vinp[[j]][[k]])
          vnames[[k]] <- paste("x", k, "lag", VI[[k]], sep="")
          vnames[[k]] <- vreverse(vnames[[k]])
          VI[[k]]     <- as.numeric(VI[[k]])
          VEX[[j]][,vnames[[k]]] <- res[[k]][(i-1) - vreverse(VI[[k]]) + 1]
        }
      }
      if (!is.null(exogen)) { INP <- VEX[[j]]; INP[,nexo] <- exogen[i,] }
      else INP <- VEX[[j]]
      res[[j]][i] <- predict(model$mmodels[[j]], INP)
    }
  }
  return(res)
}
```

```{r}

# ── Função auxiliar de gráfico e métricas para 2 variáveis ─────────────────
fshow_multi <- function(Y, Pred1, Pred2, method, loja_nome) {
  par(mfrow=c(1,2))
  srange1 <- as.numeric(diff(quantile(Y[,1], probs=c(0.01,0.99))))
  srange2 <- as.numeric(diff(quantile(Y[,2], probs=c(0.01,0.99))))
  nmae1   <- round(mmetric(Y[,1], Pred1, metric="NMAE", val=srange1), 1)
  nmae2   <- round(mmetric(Y[,2], Pred2, metric="NMAE", val=srange2), 1)
  mgraph(Y[,1], Pred1, graph="REG", Grid=10,
         main=paste0(loja_nome, " ", method, " Num_Customers (NMAE=", nmae1, "%)"),
         col=c("black","blue"), leg=list(pos="topleft", leg=c("real",method)))
  mgraph(Y[,2], Pred2, graph="REG", Grid=10,
         main=paste0(loja_nome, " ", method, " Sales (NMAE=", nmae2, "%)"),
         col=c("black","red"),  leg=list(pos="topleft", leg=c("real",method)))
  par(mfrow=c(1,1))
  cat(method, loja_nome,
      "| Num_Customers NMAE:", nmae1, "%",
      "| Sales NMAE:", nmae2, "%\n")
}

# ── Preparar matriz endógena a partir do dataframe multi ───────────────────
prepare_endogenous <- function(df_multi) {
  # Endógenas: Num_Customers e Sales_Lag1 (proxy de Sales sem data leakage)
  mtr_end <- cbind(
    Num_Customers = df_multi$Num_Customers,
    Sales         = df_multi$Sales_Lag1
  )
  # Remover linhas com NA (primeiros registos por causa dos lags)
  mtr_end <- mtr_end[complete.cases(mtr_end), ]
  return(mtr_end)
}


```


```{r}
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# FASE I — MULTIVARIADO
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
forecast_multi_phaseI_configs <- function(df_multi, loja_nome,    # ← nome alterado
                                           configs=MULTI_CONFIGS,  # ← novo argumento
                                           npred=NPRED) {
  mtr_end <- prepare_endogenous(df_multi)
  N       <- nrow(mtr_end)
  resultados_config <- list()                                       # ← novo

  for (cfg_nome in names(configs)) {                               # ← novo loop
    exo_cols <- configs[[cfg_nome]]                                # ← novo
    cat("\n--", loja_nome, cfg_nome, "--\n")
    cat("Exógenas:", paste(exo_cols, collapse=", "), "\n")

    exogen <- prepare_exogenous_config(df_multi, N, exo_cols)     # ← alterado
    hd     <- holdout(mtr_end[,1], ratio=npred, mode="order")
    Y      <- mtr_end[hd$ts,]
    exotr  <- if (!is.null(exogen)) exogen[hd$tr,,drop=FALSE] else NULL
    exots  <- if (!is.null(exogen)) exogen[hd$ts,,drop=FALSE] else NULL

    cat("\n======", loja_nome, "(Multivariado Fase I) ======\n")
    cat("N:", N, "| Treino:", length(hd$tr), "| Teste:", npred, "\n")

    MNN  <- mfit(mtr_end[hd$tr,], "mlpe", VINP, exogen=exotr)
    Pred <- lforecastm(MNN, h=npred, exogen=exots)
    Pred[[1]] <- postprocess_predictions(Pred[[1]])

    fshow_multi(Y, Pred[[1]], Pred[[2]], cfg_nome, loja_nome)     # ← cfg_nome em vez de "MLPE"

    srange1 <- as.numeric(diff(quantile(mtr_end[,1], probs=c(0.01,0.99))))
    resultados_config[[cfg_nome]] <- list(                        # ← novo — guarda por config
      Y=Y, Pred=Pred,
      nmae=mmetric(Y[,1], Pred[[1]], metric="NMAE", val=srange1),
      rmse=mmetric(Y[,1], Pred[[1]], metric="RMSE")
    )
  }                                                                # ← fecho do loop
  return(resultados_config)                                        # ← alterado
}

# ← nomes alterados de res_multi_* para res_multi_*
res_multi_balt <- forecast_multi_phaseI_configs(baltimore_multi,    "Baltimore")
res_multi_lanc <- forecast_multi_phaseI_configs(lancaster_multi,    "Lancaster")
res_multi_phil <- forecast_multi_phaseI_configs(philadelphia_multi, "Philadelphia")
res_multi_rich <- forecast_multi_phaseI_configs(richmond_multi,     "Richmond")

```

```{r}
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# FASE II — MULTIVARIADO — Growing Window com RUNS fixo
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
backtesting_multi_configs <- function(df_multi, loja_nome,         # ← nome alterado
                                       configs=MULTI_CONFIGS,       # ← novo argumento
                                       npred=NPRED, runs=RUNS, step=STEP) {

  mtr_end  <- prepare_endogenous(df_multi)
  N        <- nrow(mtr_end)
  srange_c <- as.numeric(diff(quantile(mtr_end[,1], probs=c(0.01,0.99))))
  W        <- N - npred - (runs - 1) * step
  if (W < 30) stop("Janela demasiado pequena.")

  cat("Loja:", loja_nome, "| N:", N, "| W:", W, "| runs:", runs, "\n")
  resultados_config <- list()                                       # ← novo

  for (cfg_nome in names(configs)) {                               # ← novo loop
    exo_cols    <- configs[[cfg_nome]]                             # ← novo
    cat("\n===", loja_nome, cfg_nome, "===\n")
    cat("Exógenas:", paste(exo_cols, collapse=", "), "\n")

    exogen_full <- prepare_exogenous_config(df_multi, N, exo_cols) # ← alterado (era prepare_exogenous)

    ev_mlpe_nmae <- numeric(runs); ev_mlpe_rmse <- numeric(runs)
    ev_sn_nmae   <- numeric(runs); ev_sn_rmse   <- numeric(runs)
    all_Y <- c(); all_MLPE <- c()

    for (b in 1:runs) {
      H2 <- holdout(mtr_end[,1], ratio=npred, mode="incremental",
                    iter=b, window=W, increment=step)

      Y_real <- mtr_end[H2$ts, 1]
      exotr  <- if (!is.null(exogen_full)) exogen_full[H2$tr,,drop=FALSE] else NULL
      exots  <- if (!is.null(exogen_full)) exogen_full[H2$ts,,drop=FALSE] else NULL

      MNN    <- mfit(mtr_end[H2$tr,], "mlpe", VINP, exogen=exotr)
      Pred   <- lforecastm(MNN, h=npred, exogen=exots)
      P_mlpe <- postprocess_predictions(Pred[[1]])
      P_sn   <- as.integer(round(mtr_end[(H2$ts[1]-npred):(H2$ts[1]-1), 1]))

      ev_mlpe_nmae[b] <- mmetric(Y_real, P_mlpe, metric="NMAE", val=srange_c)
      ev_mlpe_rmse[b] <- mmetric(Y_real, P_mlpe, metric="RMSE")
      ev_sn_nmae[b]   <- mmetric(Y_real, P_sn,   metric="NMAE", val=srange_c)
      ev_sn_rmse[b]   <- mmetric(Y_real, P_sn,   metric="RMSE")

      cat("Iter:", b,
          "| MLPE:", round(ev_mlpe_nmae[b],1), "/", round(ev_mlpe_rmse[b],1),
          "| SN:",   round(ev_sn_nmae[b],1),   "/", round(ev_sn_rmse[b],1), "\n")

      all_Y    <- c(all_Y,    Y_real)
      all_MLPE <- c(all_MLPE, P_mlpe)
    }

    med_mlpe_nmae <- median(ev_mlpe_nmae); med_mlpe_rmse <- median(ev_mlpe_rmse)
    med_sn_nmae   <- median(ev_sn_nmae);   med_sn_rmse   <- median(ev_sn_rmse)

    cat("\n---", loja_nome, cfg_nome, "---\n")                    # ← cfg_nome adicionado
    cat("MLPE | mediana NMAE:", round(med_mlpe_nmae,2), "% | mediana RMSE:", round(med_mlpe_rmse,2), "\n")
    cat("SN   | mediana NMAE:", round(med_sn_nmae,2),   "% | mediana RMSE:", round(med_sn_rmse,2),   "\n")

    all_nmae <- c(med_mlpe_nmae, med_sn_nmae)
    all_rmse <- c(med_mlpe_rmse, med_sn_rmse)
    scores   <- c(
      MLPE = weighted_score(med_mlpe_nmae, med_mlpe_rmse, all_nmae, all_rmse),
      SN   = weighted_score(med_sn_nmae,   med_sn_rmse,   all_nmae, all_rmse)
    )
    melhor <- names(which.min(scores))
    cat("Score ponderado:", paste(names(scores), round(scores,3), sep="=", collapse=" | "), "\n")
    cat("Melhor:", melhor, "| Melhoria vs SN:",
        round((med_sn_nmae - med_mlpe_nmae) / med_sn_nmae * 100, 1), "%\n")

    plot(all_Y, type="l", col="black",
         main=paste0(loja_nome, " ", cfg_nome, " — Growing Window"), # ← cfg_nome adicionado
         ylab="Num_Customers", xlab="Observações de teste acumuladas")
    lines(all_MLPE, col="red", lty=2)
    legend("topright", c("Real","MLPE"), col=c("black","red"), lty=c(1,2))

    resultados_config[[cfg_nome]] <- list(                         # ← novo — guarda por config
      ev_mlpe_nmae=ev_mlpe_nmae, ev_mlpe_rmse=ev_mlpe_rmse,
      ev_sn_nmae=ev_sn_nmae,     ev_sn_rmse=ev_sn_rmse,
      med_mlpe_nmae=med_mlpe_nmae, med_mlpe_rmse=med_mlpe_rmse,
      med_sn_nmae=med_sn_nmae,     med_sn_rmse=med_sn_rmse,
      scores=scores, melhor=melhor
    )
  }                                                                # ← fecho do loop
  return(resultados_config)                                        # ← alterado
}

bt_multi_balt <- backtesting_multi_configs(baltimore_multi,    "Baltimore")   # ← nome alterado
bt_multi_lanc <- backtesting_multi_configs(lancaster_multi,    "Lancaster")
bt_multi_phil <- backtesting_multi_configs(philadelphia_multi, "Philadelphia")
bt_multi_rich <- backtesting_multi_configs(richmond_multi,     "Richmond")
```


```{r}
# ── Gráfico NMAE + RMSE por iteração — Multivariado ────────────────────────
plot_metricas_multi <- function(bt_result, loja_nome) {

  for (cfg_nome in names(bt_result)) {                            # ← novo loop pelas configs
    r     <- bt_result[[cfg_nome]]                               # ← novo
    runs  <- length(r$ev_mlpe_nmae)                              # ← era bt_result$ev_mlpe_nmae
    iters <- 1:runs

    par(mfrow=c(1,2))

    # NMAE
    ylim_nmae <- range(c(r$ev_mlpe_nmae, r$ev_sn_nmae))
    plot(iters, r$ev_mlpe_nmae, type="b", col="red", pch=19, lty=1,
         ylim=ylim_nmae,
         main=paste0(loja_nome, " ", cfg_nome, " — NMAE por iteração"), # ← cfg_nome adicionado
         xlab="Iteração", ylab="NMAE (%)")
    lines(iters, r$ev_sn_nmae, type="b", col="black", pch=15, lty=2)
    abline(h=median(r$ev_mlpe_nmae), col="red",   lty=2, lwd=1.5)
    abline(h=median(r$ev_sn_nmae),   col="black", lty=2, lwd=1.5)
    legend("topright",
           c(paste0("MLPE (med=", round(median(r$ev_mlpe_nmae),1), "%)"),
             paste0("SN (med=",   round(median(r$ev_sn_nmae),1),   "%)")),
           col=c("red","black"), lty=c(1,2), pch=c(19,15))

    # RMSE
    ylim_rmse <- range(c(r$ev_mlpe_rmse, r$ev_sn_rmse))
    plot(iters, r$ev_mlpe_rmse, type="b", col="red", pch=19, lty=1,
         ylim=ylim_rmse,
         main=paste0(loja_nome, " ", cfg_nome, " — RMSE por iteração"), # ← cfg_nome adicionado
         xlab="Iteração", ylab="RMSE")
    lines(iters, r$ev_sn_rmse, type="b", col="black", pch=15, lty=2)
    abline(h=median(r$ev_mlpe_rmse), col="red",   lty=2, lwd=1.5)
    abline(h=median(r$ev_sn_rmse),   col="black", lty=2, lwd=1.5)
    legend("topright",
           c(paste0("MLPE (med=", round(median(r$ev_mlpe_rmse),1), ")"),
             paste0("SN (med=",   round(median(r$ev_sn_rmse),1),   ")")),
           col=c("red","black"), lty=c(1,2), pch=c(19,15))

    par(mfrow=c(1,1))
  }                                                               # ← fecho do loop
}

plot_metricas_multi(bt_multi_balt, "Baltimore")
plot_metricas_multi(bt_multi_lanc, "Lancaster")
plot_metricas_multi(bt_multi_phil, "Philadelphia")
plot_metricas_multi(bt_multi_rich, "Richmond")
```

```{r}
# ── Tabela resumo multivariado ──────────────────────────────────────────────
build_tabela_multi <- function(bt_list, loja_nome) {             # ← nova função
  rows <- lapply(names(bt_list), function(cfg) {
    r <- bt_list[[cfg]]
    data.frame(
      Loja         = loja_nome,
      Config       = cfg,
      MLPE_NMAE    = round(r$med_mlpe_nmae, 2),
      MLPE_RMSE    = round(r$med_mlpe_rmse, 2),
      SN_NMAE      = round(r$med_sn_nmae,   2),
      SN_RMSE      = round(r$med_sn_rmse,   2),
      Melhor       = r$melhor,
      Melhoria_pct = round(
        (r$med_sn_nmae - r$med_mlpe_nmae) / r$med_sn_nmae * 100, 1)
    )
  })
  do.call(rbind, rows)
}

# ← em vez de construir manualmente com median(bt_multi_balt$ev_mlpe_nmae)
tabela_multi <- rbind(
  build_tabela_multi(bt_multi_balt, "Baltimore"),
  build_tabela_multi(bt_multi_lanc, "Lancaster"),
  build_tabela_multi(bt_multi_phil, "Philadelphia"),
  build_tabela_multi(bt_multi_rich, "Richmond")
)
print(tabela_multi)
```

```{r}
get_melhor_multi <- function(bt_multi) {
  scores_por_config <- sapply(names(bt_multi), function(cfg) {
    bt_multi[[cfg]]$scores["MLPE"]
  })
  melhor_cfg <- names(which.min(scores_por_config))
  exo_cols   <- MULTI_CONFIGS[[melhor_cfg]]
  cat("Melhor config:", melhor_cfg, "\n")
  return(list(cfg=melhor_cfg, exo_cols=exo_cols))
}

previsao_final_multi <- function(df_multi, loja_nome, exo_cols, npred=NPRED,
                                  datas_futuras=NULL) {
  mtr_end <- prepare_endogenous(df_multi)
  N       <- nrow(mtr_end)
  exogen  <- prepare_exogenous_config(df_multi, N, exo_cols)

  MNN  <- mfit(mtr_end, "mlpe", VINP, exogen=exogen)
  Pred <- lforecastm(MNN, h=npred, exogen=if (!is.null(exogen)) tail(exogen, npred) else NULL)
  P_final <- postprocess_predictions(Pred[[1]], datas_futuras)

  cat("\n===", loja_nome, "Multi — Previsão próximos 7 dias ===\n")
  for (i in 1:npred) {
    data_str <- if (!is.null(datas_futuras)) paste0(" (", format(as.Date(datas_futuras)[i], "%Y-%m-%d"), ")") else ""
    cat("Dia +", i, data_str, ":", P_final[i], "clientes\n")
  }
  return(P_final)
}

melhor_multi_balt <- get_melhor_multi(bt_multi_balt)
melhor_multi_lanc <- get_melhor_multi(bt_multi_lanc)
melhor_multi_phil <- get_melhor_multi(bt_multi_phil)
melhor_multi_rich <- get_melhor_multi(bt_multi_rich)

prev_multi_balt <- previsao_final_multi(baltimore_multi, "Baltimore",
                                         exo_cols=melhor_multi_balt$exo_cols,
                                         datas_futuras=datas_futuras)
prev_multi_lanc <- previsao_final_multi(lancaster_multi, "Lancaster",
                                         exo_cols=melhor_multi_lanc$exo_cols,
                                         datas_futuras=datas_futuras)
prev_multi_phil <- previsao_final_multi(philadelphia_multi, "Philadelphia",
                                         exo_cols=melhor_multi_phil$exo_cols,
                                         datas_futuras=datas_futuras)
prev_multi_rich <- previsao_final_multi(richmond_multi, "Richmond",
                                         exo_cols=melhor_multi_rich$exo_cols,
                                         datas_futuras=datas_futuras)
```
